title: ReAuditFindings
description: Stage 4 (class re-audit) output: a fresh finding set over the touched components, in the shape of the original audit finders, diffed against the ledger downstream (DESIGN.md Stage 4). Authored HERE because yggdrasil's remediation-flow schema set does not yet ship a findings schema; the shape mirrors the re-auditor profile's output contract and will move to yggdrasil when one lands there.

area_summary.description: Two-sentence overall assessment of the audited component.
